summary: Clear soundboard capture of an energetic summer‑80 show highlighted by a smoking China > Rider, rare High Time and a fiery second set.
review: The recording is a crisp soundboard source that lets the band’s high‑energy playing shine – harmonies are tight, guitars clear and the crowd ambience pleasant.  Fans rave about the first‑set closers (Big RR Blues, Stranger) and a second set packed with China > Rider, High Time, Althea, Estimated > Eyes and an expansive Drum‑Space‑NFA‑Stella sequence.  A few reviewers note minor placement quirks (C.C. Rider in the second set) but overall the performance is judged very solid.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviews are 4‑5 stars praising both the musical flow and the clear soundboard recording; only isolated minor criticisms appear.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, crisp mix with nice vocal harmonies; a few listeners note it isn’t “the best” but overall very listenable and free of major drop‑outs.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Two lively sets with a strong first‑set close (Big RR Blues, Stranger) and a second set that keeps momentum despite an unconventional C.C. Rider placement; overall pacing is energetic and satisfying.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Extra grit on Tennessee Jed vocals, strong guitar tone, rare High Time appearance.
band_member_comments.Drums: Solid drumming highlighted in the Drum‑Space‑NFA‑Stella sequence.
